fields.title: How to Optimize a YouTube Channel
fields.metaTitle: How to Optimize a YouTube Channel | Learn | InstantViral
fields.metaDescription: Channel optimization covers branding, trailer, sections, and upload defaults. Make the channel promise scannable before focusing on individual video SEO.
